examples: Results: (1) Molecular quantity of the purified flagellin was about 65kd by SDS-PAGE electrophoresis.
ResultsThe PCR by specific flagellin gene primer has high sensitivity. All of 3 controls were negative.
CBLB502 is a polypeptide drug derived from a portion of Salmonella flagellin that binds to and potently activates TLR5.
